posts.text: Bandhan Bank promoter confirms no encumbrance on shares for FY26

posts.author: james_kerala
posts.community: Bandhan Bank - in a sweet spot?
posts.text: The Economic Times Born out of microfinance, Bandhan Bank now bets big on AI and digital banking As Bandhan Bank accelerates its transition from a microfinance-led institution into a universal bank, Executive Director & COO Ratan Kumar Kesh explains how technology, AI, and data are reshaping lending, customer acquisition, and financial... After long time i am seeing green shoots. Trading above 50 & 200 DMA after 8 years of relentless correction. Have a small position and watching.
